chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 200 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.797/2017 2. For hearing of main case 26.03.2025 Mr. Ghulam Haider Shaikh, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Learned counsel for the petitioner seeks that the assessment, subject matter herein, may be finalized by the department, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
